hole_ref: c6/c7 H7 — WMM 2025 missing inline URL
summary: Duplicate routing of c6/c7 H7 (WMM 2025 missing inline URL) — canonical is ISS-1940 (PATCH-323-C in EXP-323 verification batch 7). c7 review explicitly recommended consolidating this triplet (ISS-1940+1943+1956) into a single close. Recommend close as duplicate-of ISS-1940.
